data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of skipping individual occurrences, but the linked use case does not provide sufficient evidence to confirm this functionality. The use case mentions the ability to skip specific dates but does not explicitly state that individual occurrences can be skipped, leading to a gap in the requirement coverage. This lack of clarity indicates that the requirement is not fully satisfied as expected.
gaps: The linked use case does not explicitly confirm the ability to skip individual occurrences as required.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
